name: Coconut Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl and beat well.
2. Stir in the 1 cup of flaked coconut until evenly distributed.
3. Pour the mixture into the partially baked pie shell.
4. Bake at 325°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until set.
5. Cool on a wire rack.
6. Garnish with toasted coconut, if desired.
